---
title: "Jesse Miller"
image: "files/profile_pic.png"
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:jesse.miller@rady.ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jesse-miller11/

format:
  html:
    page-layout: full

---

## Current

 - MSBA Student [|]{.yellow} [UCSD Rady]{.altgreen}
 - Rady Data Analytics Club, Marketing & Communications Director [|]{.yellow} [GBK Collective]{.altgreen}
 - Capstone Consultant: Local Media San Diego [|]{.yellow} [UCLA Anderson]{.altgreen}
 - Musician & Co-founder: Rain on Fridays

-----

## Work History

 - Project Manager, The Banshee [|]{.yellow} [2024 - 2025]{.altgreen}
 - Rain on Fridays LLC [|]{.yellow} [2020 - Present]{.altgreen}
 - Music Director & Music Promotions Director, KCR College Radio [|]{.yellow} [2021 - 2023]{.altgreen}
 - Business Operations Intern, Beth Am Early Childhood Center [|]{.yellow} [2021]{.altgreen}

-----

## Education

 - M.S Business Analytics [|]{.yellow} [UC San Diego, Rady School of Management 2025-2026]{.altgreen}
 - Bachelor of Art in Interdisciplinary Studies (Management Information Systems, Finance, Pyschology) [|]{.yellow} [San Diego State University 2019-2022]{.altgreen}
 - Business Intelligence Analysis Professional Certificate [|]{.yellow} [UCSD Extended Studies]{.altgreen}

:::
